description_long: This advertising board features a rectangular display panel mounted horizontally on a sturdy, single vertical pole with a square base for stability. The display area is bordered by a dark, likely metallic or wooden frame, and the surface shows a partially visible printed advertisement with graffiti-style text and graphics. Four adjustable spotlights are mounted above the board on metal arms, providing targeted illumination for the display. The board's structure appears robust, with metal brackets securing the panel to the support frame. The overall design is functional and utilitarian, suitable for outdoor urban environments. The materials and construction suggest durability against weather and public interaction.
description: A rectangular advertising board with a dark frame, graffiti-style printed content, and four overhead spotlights on metal arms, mounted on a single vertical pole with a square base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main display area with graffiti-style graphics and the supporting frame, as well as the spotlights above.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the board, the arrangement of the four spotlights, and the depth of the frame.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the display panel, mounting brackets, and the supporting pole structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the spotlights and the board's slim profile.
attribute_frame_design: medium-thickness dark frame with straight edges and metal brackets
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed poster with graffiti-style text and graphics
